---
title: "NHS App Utilisation"
author: "<a href='https://github.com/ASW-Analyst/'>Andy Wilson</a><br><a href='https://transformationunit.nhs.uk/'>NHS Transformation Unit</a>"
date: "07/29/2025"
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
    self-contained: true
    css: ../config/nhs_tu_theme.css
---


# Introduction

* Reference to feedback in 10YP
* Remit of HealthWatch

# What is publicly available about app usage

* National MI Report
* Analysis of variation in usage across ICBs
* What isn't published

# Demographics FOI Request

* What was in the FOI
* What couldn't be provided
* Age group analysis
* Deprivation analysis

# Going forward, how to engage with users

* Key questions
* Need to monitor demographics
* Delivery plan and need to include training and engagement with the app
